title: YouTube Thumbnail Dark Fantasy Wizard Podcast Poster
sourceTitle: Youtube Thumbnail Dark Fantasy Wizard Podcast Poster

imagePrompts.prompt: A dramatic dark fantasy studio poster of two wizard-like figures posed like a parody heavy-metal album cover. In the foreground, a stocky older wizard sits or leans toward the camera, wearing a glossy black hooded robe, large over-ear studio headphones, and a long thick white beard spilling over his chest. He grips a tall black staff in his left hand; the staff has an elongated spearhead-shaped ornate top with open lattice details. A large black podcast microphone on a boom or stand is positioned directly in front of him at mouth level, with a visible sticker that reads "CARAJO" on the microphone body. Behind him stands a second older wizard in a luminous white robe with gold trim and a rope belt, also with long white hair and a long white beard. He holds a tall white staff with a matching ornate spearhead top in his right hand and extends his left hand toward the viewer in a commanding spell-casting gesture, fingers spread. Behind the standing wizard’s head is a bright electric-blue glowing circular halo made of runes, creating a magical summoning-ring effect. The background is pure black, with high-contrast cinematic lighting: cool blue rim light from behind and warm highlights on the hands, robes, and staffs. The composition is vertical, tightly framed, with the black-robed wizard occupying the lower center and the white-robed wizard towering behind him. At the bottom center, add the title {argument name="title text" default="GORDALF"} in huge metallic stone-textured gothic block letters, like a fantasy metal logo, and place 1 small occult-style emblem centered underneath the word. Photorealistic cosplay portrait, ultra-detailed fabrics, theatrical fantasy realism, poster design, sharp focus, moody epic atmosphere.
